name: Does AEO hurt my defense?
description: **Blocks client review; motion to challenge.** Balance required.[2]

acceptedAnswer.text: **Blocks client review; motion to challenge.** Balance required.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, AEO can hinder defense by blocking client input on key docs.** Courts balance this.[2] Key factors: Limits strategy discussion. Push for 'outside counsel only' alternatives. Motion for access. Early order negotiation key. Experienced counsel mitigates.
